hero.badge: An AI that learns from you, an ever-growing library
hero.subtitle: Turn your spare time into micro-victories. An ever-evolving library of micro-actions, powered by an AI that adapts to your habits, energy, and rhythm.

problem.title: Time — your most precious resource
problem.description: Every day, dozens of minutes of available time slip away: commutes, waiting lines, breaks between meetings. These fragmented moments feel too short to be useful.
problem.point1: 2 to 15 minutes lost, several times a day
problem.point2: Too short to be productive, too long to do nothing
problem.point3: Cognitive overload from too many apps

features.title: The InFinea solution
features.subtitle: An infinite library of micro-actions, an AI that learns from you. What should you do now? InFinea knows.

appleCalendarGuide.title: Connect Apple Calendar
appleCalendarGuide.description: Follow these steps to connect your Apple Calendar to InFinea.
appleCalendarGuide.connectFailed: Unable to connect. Check the URL and try again.
appleCalendarGuide.urlValidationError: URL must start with webcal://, https:// or http://

openICloud.title: Open iCloud
openICloud.instruction: Go to icloud.com/calendar from your browser and sign in with your Apple ID.
openICloud.tip: Use a computer for this step — it is easier.

shareCalendar.title: Share the calendar
shareCalendar.instruction: Click the share icon next to your calendar name in the left sidebar.
shareCalendar.tip: Choose the calendar you use most (often "Home" or "Work").

enablePublic.title: Enable public calendar
enablePublic.instruction: Check "Public Calendar" at the bottom of the sharing window. A link will appear — click it to copy.
enablePublic.tip: The link starts with webcal:// — that is normal, InFinea handles it automatically.

pasteUrl.title: Paste the URL here
pasteUrl.instruction: Paste the copied link in the field below. InFinea will automatically verify that everything works.

dataController.heading: 1. Data Controller
dataController.text: The data controller for data collected on InFinea is:

dataCollected.heading: 2. Data Collected
dataCollected.intro: As part of using the service, we collect the following data:
dataCollected.connectionText: IP address, browser type (via analytics cookies)
dataCollected.googleCalendarText: calendar information (title, times, event duration) — read-only access

googleData.heading: 3. Use of Google Data
googleData.intro: InFinea uses the Google Calendar API with read-only access (scope
googleData.introSuffix: ). This access is strictly limited to the following purposes:
googleData.freeSlotText: reading your events to identify available time slots and suggest suitable micro-actions
googleData.contextualText: adapting recommendations based on the duration of your free slots
googleData.notDoTitle: What we do NOT do with your Google data:
googleData.notDo1: We do not modify, create, or delete any events in your calendar
googleData.notDo2: We do not share your Google Calendar data with third parties
googleData.notDo3: We do not permanently store the content of your events — only time slots are analyzed in real time
googleData.notDo4: We do not use your Google data for advertising purposes
googleData.notDo5: We do not transfer your Google data to AI or machine learning tools unrelated to the service
googleData.complianceText: Use of data received from Google APIs complies with the
googleData.complianceLink: Google API Services User Data Policy
googleData.revokeText: You can revoke InFinea’s access to your Google Calendar at any time from the
googleData.revokeSuffix: page or from the Integrations page in your InFinea account.

purposes.heading: 4. Processing Purposes
purposes.item1: Providing and personalizing the service (AI suggestions, micro-actions)
purposes.item3: Continuous improvement of the service and user experience
purposes.item5: Payment and subscription management via Stripe

legalBasis.heading: 5. Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.contractText: processing necessary for providing the service (Article 6.1.b GDPR)
legalBasis.consentText: for analytics cookies and optional communications (Article 6.1.a)

retention.heading: 6. Data Retention
retention.text: Your data is retained for the duration of your use of the service. If you delete your account, your personal data will be deleted within 30 days, except for data required to meet our legal obligations (billing data: 10 years).

rights.heading: 7. Your Rights
rights.intro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:
rights.accessText: (Article 15): obtain a copy of your personal data
rights.portabilityText: (Article 20): receive your data in a structured format
rights.objectionText: (Article 21): object to the processing of your data
rights.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at

deletion.heading: 8. Data Deletion
deletion.intro: You can request the deletion of your data in several ways:
deletion.accountText: from the Profile page of the application, you can delete your account. All your personal data, including integration tokens and session history, will be deleted within 30 days
deletion.googleText: you can disconnect Google Calendar from the Integrations page or from your
deletion.googleSuffix: . Your Google access tokens will be immediately deleted from our servers
deletion.emailSuffix: for any deletion request. We will process your request within 30 days

hosting.heading: 9. Hosting and Security
hosting.intro: Your data is hosted by the following providers:
hosting.render: (API server) — hosting in the United States
hosting.vercel: (web application) — global CDN with European points of presence
hosting.encryption: Integration tokens are encrypted with AES-256 (Fernet) before database storage. Passwords are hashed with bcrypt.

cookies.heading: 10. Cookies and Trackers
cookies.analyticsText: PostHog (anonymized usage analytics) — subject to your consent
cookies.disable: You can disable analytics cookies at any time through your browser settings.

transfers.heading: 11. Data Transfers
transfers.text: Some data may be transferred to the United States (Render, Vercel). These transfers are governed by the European Commission standard contractual clauses and/or the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.

contactSection.heading: 12. Contact and Complaints
contactSection.text: For any questions regarding the protection of your data, contact us at
contactSection.cnilText: If you believe the processing of your data constitutes a GDPR violation, you can file a complaint with the
contactSection.cnilName: CNIL (French National Commission for Information Technology and Civil Liberties)

purpose.heading: 1. Purpose
purpose.text1: These Terms of Service (hereinafter "ToS") govern access to and use of the InFinea platform, accessible at
purpose.text2: InFinea is a personal productivity service that helps users transform their available time into productive micro-actions, through AI-powered personalized suggestions.

acceptance.heading: 2. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text: Registration and use of the service implies full and complete acceptance of these ToS. If you do not accept these terms, you must not use the service. InFinea reserves the right to modify these ToS at any time. Users will be informed of any substantial changes by email or in-app notification.

access.heading: 3. Service Access
access.intro: Access to the service requires the creation of a user account. To create an account, you must:
access.item3: Create a secure password or authenticate via Google
access.item4: Create only one account per person
access.responsibility: You are responsible for the confidentiality of your login credentials and all activity conducted from your account.

serviceDescription.heading: 4. Service Description
serviceDescription.microActionsText: catalog of over 300 short actions (2–15 minutes) in learning, productivity, and well-being
serviceDescription.aiSuggestionsText: personalized recommendations based on your profile, energy level, and available time
serviceDescription.integrationsText: connection to third-party services (Google Calendar, Notion, Todoist, Slack, iCal) for an enhanced experience

pricing.heading: 5. Plans and Pricing
pricing.freeText: access to basic micro-actions, limited AI suggestions, progress tracking
pricing.premiumText: unlimited AI suggestions, access to all micro-actions, full integrations, detailed statistics
pricing.paymentInfo: Payments are handled by Stripe. The Premium subscription is automatically renewed each month. You can cancel at any time from your profile; Premium access remains active until the end of the paid period.

userObligations.heading: 6. User Obligations
userObligations.intro: By using InFinea, you agree to:
userObligations.item2: Not use the service for illegal purposes or purposes contrary to these ToS
userObligations.item3: Not attempt unauthorized access to InFinea systems
userObligations.item4: Not disrupt the operation of the service
userObligations.item5: Respect the intellectual property rights of InFinea and third parties

intellectualProperty.heading: 7. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.text: All elements of the InFinea service (text, graphics, software, images, trademarks, logos) are protected by intellectual property law. Any unauthorized reproduction, representation, or exploitation is prohibited. AI-generated content provided to the user remains for personal use only.

liability.heading: 8. Liability
liability.intro: InFinea strives to ensure the availability and proper functioning of the service. However:
liability.item1: The service is provided "as is", without guarantee of uninterrupted or error-free operation
liability.item2: AI suggestions are indicative and do not constitute professional advice (medical, financial, or otherwise)
liability.item3: InFinea shall not be liable for indirect damages resulting from the use of the service
liability.item4: Third-party integrations are subject to their respective providers’ terms

personalData.heading: 9. Personal Data
personalData.text1: The processing of your personal data is detailed in our
personalData.text2: By using InFinea, you accept this processing in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

termination.heading: 10. Termination
termination.text: You can delete your account at any time from your profile settings. InFinea reserves the right to suspend or delete an account in case of violation of these ToS, with prior notice except in emergencies.

modifications.heading: 11. Modifications to the ToS
modifications.text: InFinea reserves the right to modify these ToS at any time. Changes take effect upon publication. Continued use of the service after modification constitutes acceptance of the new ToS. In case of substantial changes, users will be informed by email at least 30 days before they take effect.

applicableLaw.heading: 12. Applicable Law
applicableLaw.text: These ToS are governed by French law. In case of dispute, the parties agree to seek an amicable solution. Failing that, French courts shall have sole jurisdiction.

contactSection.heading: 13. Contact
contactSection.text: For any questions regarding these ToS, contact us at
